items.title: TVK president Vijay to be sworn in as Chief Minister on May 10; T.N. set for coalition government
items.summary: TVK secures support of five Congress MLAs-elect, two each from CPI, CPI(M), VCK and IUML, taking the tally to 120

items.title: Mexican parents criticise ending school year a month early for World Cup
items.summary: The federal government faces widespread anger for saying the school year could end on 5 June to accommodate the football tournament.

items.title: Frontier Airlines plane fatally strikes person during takeoff at Denver airport
